zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)於1439年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯時，他的父親Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)24歲，母親Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple17歲。他於1472年與Isabella Kirkpatrick在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1488年6月11日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)于1439年出生在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯时，他的父亲Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)24岁，母亲Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple17岁。他于1472年与Isabella Kirkpatrick在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1488年6月11日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾享年49岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰度福利爾。

nameMeanings.name: Grierson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Kirkcudbrightshire): from the medieval Scottish personal name Grier , a vernacular form of Gregor (see Gregory ), + son. Compare Greer , with which some variation is evident among the early bearers, and compare Gregor and McGregor .

History: A Scottish family by the name of Grierson claim descent from Gilbert, a son of Malcolm MacGregor (died 1374), 11th Lord of MacGregor. Gilbert was known as both MacGregor and Gregorson. In 1400 he was granted lands by the Earl of March in the name Grierson. The numerous northern Irish bearers of the name Greer claim descent from this same Gilbert.

variants.name: Grier
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): from the medieval Scottish personal name Grier, a vernacular form of Gregor (see Gregory ). This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, especially Donegal, Antrim, and Longford.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) was born in 1439, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag), was 24 and his mother, Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple, was 17. He married Isabella Kirkpatrick in 1472, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 June 1488, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) est né en 1439, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag), avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Kirkpatrick en 1472, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1488, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) 1439 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple 17. Er hat 1472 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland Isabella Kirkpatrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Juni 1488 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Isabella Kirkpatrick nel 1472, nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 giugno 1488, nel Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)が1439年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズで生まれた時，父Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)は24歳，母Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrympleは17歳であった。1472年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズでIsabella Kirkpatrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1488年6月11日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで49歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)(이)가 1439년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1472년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 Isabella Kirkpatrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 6월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) родился в 1439 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Kirkpatrick в 1472 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 июня 1488 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
